title: Tile Product
description: Canonical schema for a tile collection at The Tile. Seed JSON and D1 rows conform to this. Runtime validation via Zod in apps/web/lib/schemas.ts.

id.description: URL slug. Lowercase, hyphen- or underscore-separated. Matches the folder name under /collections/[effect]/.

name.description: Display name of the collection (e.g. 'Tele di Marmo Precious').

effect.description: Primary visual effect — the material look. Each product has exactly one.

usage.description: Cross-cutting usage categories the product is suited for.

brand.description: Italian supplier / manufacturer. Null if unknown.

summary.description: One- to two-sentence description, used in TileCard and meta descriptions.

description.description: Full long-form description for the product detail page. Markdown allowed.

sourceUrl.description: Original URL on the-tile.com (pre-rebuild). Kept for operational reference.

attributes.description: Physical + technical characteristics specific to tiles. All fields optional; Claude Code during implementation should populate from supplier technical sheets where possible.

formats.description: Available sizes. Format string: 'widthxheight' in cm (e.g. '60x120', '30x60', '120x240').

finishes.description: Surface finishes the series is produced in.

thicknesses.description: Available thicknesses in mm. 20mm is for outdoor paving.

frostResistant.description: Safe for outdoor use in cold conditions. Malta rarely freezes but some outdoor applications still matter.

rectified.description: Whether edges are factory-ground for tight grout lines.

colourBody.description: Whether the tile's body colour matches the surface colour through the thickness.

images.description: Image references. First entry is the hero.

src.description: Path (relative) or URL (absolute) to the image. Prefer /images/products/[id]/hero.jpg.

context.description: Where this image fits in the product page composition.

tags.description: Freeform mood/style tags used by the agent for matching user intents to tiles.

bestFor.description: Use-case phrases the agent can pattern-match against user-described needs.

relatedIds.description: Manually-curated 'also consider' product IDs. If empty, related is computed by effect + tags similarity.

inStock.description: Shown on the site as 'available from showroom' vs 'special order'. Showroom updates via admin or seed JSON edit.

showInCatalog.description: Set to false to hide from /collections but keep URL live for redirects/bookmarks.

updatedAt.description: Last edit timestamp. Build script stamps automatically.

examples.name: Tele di Marmo Precious
examples.summary: Emilgroup's white-veined marble-effect range with bold veining and multiple precious variants.
